description: The ArcLayout is a component primarily used in a user's context menu. It requires a set of slots under the slot the component is attached to, and each slot needs an OutlinedArc Component and an ArcSegmentLayout Component.

fields.Arc: The amount of the circle in degrees to cover with the arc elements.
fields.Offset: the amount to rotate the arc elements around the center in degrees from the default position.
fields.Separation: how much to separate the elements from each other.
fields.CenterAtSeparation: Centers the separation point of this layout.
fields.ProportionalSize: Keep all segments of the arc proportional in size.
fields.ItemDirection: How to arrange the elements in order from the initial position.
